command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Step 1: Flag all SasBoss $49 services as costReviewNeeded
UPDATE services 
SET costReviewNeeded = 1
WHERE supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 49.00;

-- Step 2: Also check the services table for a costReviewNeeded column
SELECT COUNT(*) as updated FROM services WHERE supplierName = 'SasBoss' AND monthlyCost = 49.00 AND costReviewNeeded = 1;
logs: ERROR 1054 (42S22) at line 3: Unknown column 'costReviewNeeded' in 'field list'
